name: Grande Bleu - Daangn and Kakao Channel Daily Package
purpose: Fetch the daily local social package and route separate Daangn/Karrot and KakaoTalk Channel posting packages.

schedule.reason: GitHub Actions renders local_posts/today.json at 10:30 KST.

routes.name: Daangn business profile package
KakaoTalk Channel package

settings.recommended_action: Send Telegram failure alert with scenario name, execution URL, and HTTP response body.
settings.recovery_owner: Codex automation grande-bleu-local-posts-failure-recovery checks the feed side; Make execution errors still require Make log access or alert forwarding.

daangn.reason: Public Daangn Business documentation describes business profile and advertising features, but no stable public create-post API for Make HTTP posting was confirmed.
daangn.safe_mode: Generate package, notify, and post through the official manager surface or an approved partner/API if later granted.

kakao_channel.reason: Kakao Developers channel APIs cover relationship, channel add/chat entry points, webhook, and customer file management; general channel post publishing was not listed in the public REST API reference.
kakao_channel.safe_mode: Generate package, notify, and post through KakaoTalk Channel Manager or an approved business message/channel posting product if later granted.

test_plan: Run GitHub workflow Grande Bleu Local Posts Today Render.
Open the source URL and confirm publish=true.
Confirm two messages arrive: one Daangn package and one KakaoTalk Channel package.
Confirm image URLs open and are not repeated from the previous local_posts/history.json entries.
If a Make module fails, forward the execution URL/error email so Codex can patch the feed or Make mapping.
